title: Cafeteria Politics
description: When the school board threatens to cut the arts program, drama-kid Priscilla Boateng decides the only way to save it is to run for student body president. The problem: she's running against her own best friend, the cafeteria has a strict no-flyers policy, and her entire campaign team is three theater nerds and a vending machine. A funny, big-hearted story about winning, losing, and what friendship survives.
